Container.Name: Stirling-PDF
Container.Overview: Stirling-PDF: Comprehensive web-based PDF manipulation tool. Edit, merge, split, and convert PDFs securely.

Config.Name: App Name
Config.Description: TIER 1: Display name of your instance.

Config.Name: Timezone
Config.Description: TIER 1: Your local timezone. Example: America/Denver.

Config.Name: Data Path
Config.Description: TIER 2: Standard Mode - Path for OCR language data.

Config.Name: Configs Path
Config.Description: TIER 2: Standard Mode - Path for configuration files.

Config.Name: Logs Path
Config.Description: TIER 2: Standard Mode - Path for application logs.

Config.Name: Enable Login
Config.Description: TIER 3: Power Mode - Set to true to enable authentication.

Config.Name: Max File Size
Config.Description: TIER 3: Power Mode - Maximum upload size in MB.

Config.Name: Google Visibility
Config.Description: TIER 3: Power Mode - Allow search engine indexing.
